abstract: Better Beads is a Beads authoring and review skill for turning plans into behavioral execution contracts for fungible coding agents. Covers inspection-first routing, plan-readiness gates, route schema discovery, delegated helper identity, parent closure contracts, dependency graph hygiene, failure behavior, validation paths, BV readability, and reviewable PR-sized atomic slices without reducing test coverage.

required_tools.name: br
required_tools.failure_behavior: fatal when inspecting or mutating a Beads task graph

required_tools.name: bv
required_tools.failure_behavior: fatal for robot graph triage and planning gates

required_tools.name: python3
required_tools.failure_behavior: fatal for validation and schema contract checks

required.name: scripts/test_schemas.sh
required.failure_behavior: fatal for schema and contract validation

optional.name: jsonschema
optional.failure_behavior: optional; skip the extra local cross-check when unavailable

triggers: converting plans or PRDs into beads
exclusions: feature implementation for beads produced by the skill
broad code rewrites unrelated to Beads authoring or graph quality
interactive TUI operation when robot-mode surfaces are available
